import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
import inspect
from tsr.models.nerf_renderer import NeRFRenderer
print('NeRFRenderer forward:')
print(inspect.getsource(NeRFRenderer.forward))
print('\n_forward:')
print(inspect.getsource(NeRFRenderer._forward))

# Also check get_spherical_cameras
from tsr.utils import get_spherical_cameras
print('\nget_spherical_cameras:')
print(inspect.getsource(get_spherical_cameras))

# Also check get_ray_directions and get_rays
from tsr.utils import get_ray_directions, get_rays
print('\nget_ray_directions:')
print(inspect.getsource(get_ray_directions))
print('\nget_rays:')
print(inspect.getsource(get_rays))
